dict.string: PinWise uses the camera so you can photograph a vial label or take a progress photo. Photos stay on your device.
PinWise uses Face ID to lock the app, so only you can open it. This is optional and off by default.
PinWise displays the weight, resting heart rate, HRV, sleep, and step values you choose to share from Health alongside your dose logs.
PinWise uses the microphone so you can speak a vial's details to fill them in. Audio is transcribed on your device and isn't uploaded.
PinWise transcribes your speech on your device to fill in vial details. Nothing is sent to Apple or any server.
